# LLMify AG

> Sovereign AI infrastructure for Swiss companies. Open-source models on own infrastructure, without dependency on US cloud providers.

LLMify builds AI solutions where data never leaves the company. From strategy to custom AI applications, on Swiss infrastructure, on-premise or sovereign cloud.

## Services

- **AI Strategy**: Use case analysis, prioritisation, and roadmap development
- **AI Infrastructure**: Open-source models on Swiss infrastructure (on-premise or sovereign Swiss cloud)
- **AI Applications**: Custom applications with intelligent document search and agent workflows

## Insights

- [Open-Source Models Are Competitive](https://llmify.ch/insights/open-source-modelle/): Qwen 3.5 and Nemotron 3 Super show that open-source models compete with proprietary providers. Both run on own infrastructure, without API dependency.
- [AI Under US Jurisdiction](https://llmify.ch/insights/us-recht-ki-daten/): The CLOUD Act allows US authorities to access data in Switzerland. The Remote Access Security Act could soon regulate cloud AI too.
- [Sovereignty in Practice](https://llmify.ch/insights/souveraenitaet-praxis/): The ICC loses access to Microsoft services, the EU Parliament disables AI on all devices. Two cases showing that digital sovereignty is not theoretical.
